scripts.test:plans: rm -rf .plan-test-build && tsc --ignoreConfig scripts/generate-plan-test-cases.ts src/engine/*.ts --target ES2022 --module commonjs --moduleResolution bundler --skipLibCheck --esModuleInterop --outDir .plan-test-build --noEmit false --noImplicitAny false && printf '{"type":"commonjs"}' > .plan-test-build/package.json && node .plan-test-build/scripts/generate-plan-test-cases.js && rm -rf .plan-test-build
